_comment: Worked E9 matched-family record at dose k=3, transformed from the REAL A3 F3 record A3-C-0002-C3 (base family F3-0048). This is an actual record from corpus-candidates/A3-corrections.jsonl with the E9 metadata added by build_e9_corpus.transform_record. The same scenario exists at k=1 (A3-C-0002-C1) and k=2 (A3-C-0002-C2) — the matched family. NOTE the must_change items are stale INTERMEDIATE totals (post-0/1/2 corrections: 15400/16600/19600), each != the correct-final 23600 — the exact structure a compaction cycle can strand: a summarizer that folds in correction 1 then compacts may carry $16,600 forward instead of tracking to $23,600. This is why F3-accumulated-corrections is the right E9 substrate.
question: What is the total monthly operating cost for the month?

sources.text: Central Deck operates a 300-space parking structure and reports monthly operating results.
Monthly parking revenue is a fixed $36,000.
Per-space monthly maintenance cost is $8 per space.
Security is a fixed $4,000 per month, independent of the per-space maintenance rate.
The ground lease is a fixed $9,000 per month, independent of the per-space maintenance rate.

corrections.text: Cost revision: per-space monthly maintenance cost is now $12 per space, replacing the $8 figure.
Cost revision: monthly security is now a fixed $7,000, replacing the $4,000 figure.
Cost revision: the monthly ground lease is now a fixed $13,000, replacing the $9,000 figure.

must_change: The total monthly operating cost is $15,400.
The total monthly operating cost is $16,600.
The total monthly operating cost is $19,600.
must_persist: Monthly parking revenue is a fixed $36,000.
Central Deck operates a 300-space parking structure.
_turn_rendering_k3_ArmS: turn 1: COMPACT(sources) -> summary_1 (30-50% length); reveal correction[0] (maint $12)
turn 2: COMPACT(summary_1 + correction[0]) -> summary_2; reveal correction[1] (security $7,000)
turn 3: COMPACT(summary_2 + correction[1]) -> summary_3; reveal correction[2] (lease $13,000)
answer: [summary_3, correction[2]] + Arm-B retract-and-revise instruction -> generate; correct answer = $23,600
_turn_rendering_k3_ArmN: turns 1-3: append correction[0..2] to the FULL transcript (no compaction)
answer: full transcript (sources + all 3 corrections) + Arm-B instruction -> generate; correct answer = $23,600
